articles.title: How to Prepare for Coding & System Design Interviews in 2026
articles.description: Fifteen thousand tech professionals face coding interviews weekly. Use a structured framework combining LeetCode strategy, system design fundamentals, and behavioral preparation aligned with 2026 hiring trends.

articles.title: How to Use ChatGPT & Claude to Accelerate Your 2026 Job Search
articles.description: Job seekers who use AI tools effectively shorten their search cycle by weeks. Learn which parts of a job search AI can accelerate and where human judgment still decides the outcome.

articles.title: How to Financially Survive a Tech Layoff: COBRA, Cash Flow & Insurance
articles.description: A seven-day financial survival plan for laid-off tech workers covering severance negotiation, COBRA insurance decisions, unemployment benefits, cash flow budgeting, and smart side income strategies.

articles.title: The 2026 Entry Level Tech Job Guide for Graduates & Career Changers
articles.description: Entry-level hiring remains tight in 2026. Target your search with a portfolio-first strategy, skills-based hiring, AI tools, and structured networking to land your first tech role.

articles.title: 5 Career Pivot Pathways for 2026: Cloud, Security, AI, Data & DevOps
articles.description: Five realistic career transition paths for tech professionals in 2026. Compare cloud engineering, cybersecurity, AI and ML, data analytics, and DevOps across demand, training timeline, certification cost, and median salary.

articles.title: How To Spot Ghost Jobs Before They Waste Your Week
articles.description: One in four listings may not represent an active hire. Learn how to read the signals from job descriptions, hiring flow, and company behavior before you invest time.

articles.title: AI Resume Optimization: A 5-Step Framework That Survives ATS Filters
articles.description: ATS systems decide which resumes a recruiter sees first. Use a five-step framework to improve keyword match, readability, quantified impact, and AI-assisted editing.

articles.title: A 30-Day Post-Layoff Action Plan For Regaining Stability
articles.description: The first month after a layoff is chaotic and high-leverage. Use a four-week action plan to stabilize cash, routines, messaging, and search momentum.

articles.title: 10 Job Categories AI Still Struggles To Replace In 2026
articles.description: AI removes task bundles, not every full role. Focus on job categories where physical presence, trust, judgment, or relationship labor remain hard to automate.

articles.title: When The First Interviewer Is AI: How To Prepare Without Sounding Robotic
articles.description: AI screening interviews are becoming normal. Learn what these tools actually measure, how to structure answers, and where candidates usually fail.

articles.title: Breaking Down Job Search Anxiety Before It Becomes Self-Sabotage
articles.description: Extended job searching creates fear, avoidance, and identity strain. Use five practical tools to restore structure, reduce spirals, and keep momentum.

articles.title: 2026 Tech Layoffs: What 113,000 Cuts Actually Tell Job Seekers
articles.description: The layoff headline matters less than where cuts cluster and where hiring remains active. Use the 2026 data to decide how to position, pivot, and prioritize.

articles.title: Skills-Based Hiring in 2026: Prove Your Value Without a Degree
articles.description: Employers are moving past degrees. Use a three-phase framework to find skills-based roles, build verifiable portfolios, and sell your abilities in 2026 interviews.

articles.title: How to Network for a Job in 2026 (When Cold Applying Stopped Working)
articles.description: Cold applications are failing more than ever. Use a structured networking system to reach the right people, earn referrals, and skip the volume game in a market where inbound is cooked.

articles.title: How to Prepare for Every Type of 2026 Interview (Behavioral, Case, Take-Home, and Portfolio Review)
articles.description: Employers use four distinct interview formats in 2026. Learn what each tests, how to prepare, and common traps that quietly lower your score across every format.

articles.title: How to Recover From Job Search Burnout (Without Stopping Your Search)
articles.description: Extended job searching causes mental exhaustion that compounds over time. Use five evidence-based strategies to recover decision quality, restore confidence, and keep moving without collapsing.

articles.title: Salary Negotiation in a Weak Market: Counter Offers in 2026
articles.description: Tech professionals who negotiate earn $24,479 more annually. Learn to counter offers when leverage is lower and base salaries have dropped below 2022 peak levels.

articles.title: LinkedIn Profile Optimization 2026: How Recruiters Find You
articles.description: Recruiters source 87% of candidates via LinkedIn search. Optimize your headline, about section, and skills to rank first when recruiters look for candidates.

articles.title: The 'Layoff Boomerang': How to Handle a Rehire Offer After an AI-Driven Layoff
articles.description: Companies are laying off workers for 'AI efficiency gains' and quietly rehiring them at 40% less. Learn how to evaluate a layoff boomerang offer, negotiate better terms, and protect your career trajectory without accepting a permanent pay cut.

articles.title: How to Negotiate Remote Work in 2026 (When RTO Pressure Is Real)
articles.description: 62% of tech companies still offer remote options, but RTO mandates are tightening. Learn five evidence-backed strategies to negotiate remote work in 2026, from offer-stage leverage to performance-based renegotiation.

articles.title: Best Job Search Platforms in 2026: Where to Actually Find Jobs
articles.description: LinkedIn and Indeed are no longer enough. Evaluate 10+ job search platforms for 2026 across quality, response rate, role type fit, and AI features to decide where your search time generates the highest return.

articles.title: Why Senior Engineers Are Struggling to Find Jobs in 2026
articles.description: 183,966 tech workers laid off in 2026 — and senior engineers with 10+ years of experience are facing unexpected rejection. Learn why experience cuts both ways and how to reframe your search strategy for the two-tier job market.

articles.title: LinkedIn Profile Optimization for the 2026 Job Market
articles.description: Recruiters search LinkedIn differently in 2026. Improve your headline, summary, experience, and keywords so both AI filters and human recruiters find you first — before you even apply.

articles.title: How to Negotiate a Job Offer in a Weak Job Market (2026 Guide)
articles.description: Can you still negotiate when 63 percent of CEOs are freezing hiring? Yes — if you negotiate differently. Learn a data-backed framework for pricing, positioning, and preserving offers in a buyer's market.

articles.title: How to Pivot Into an AI Career in 2026 Without a CS Degree
articles.description: 70% of AI-related job postings in 2026 don't require a CS degree. Discover six realistic pathways into AI-adjacent roles, with concrete timelines, salary ranges, and transition plans for non-technical professionals.
